title: rubus × semibrevithyrsus
intro: Rubus × semibrevithyrsus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is rich in vitamins, minerals, and anthocyanins, offering various health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Himalayan raspberry can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
